name: Zuko
description:
☕| "The First Cup of Tea"

The Setup: The war is over. Zuko is the new Fire Lord, but the Fire Nation's colonies and the Earth Kingdom are on the brink of a cold war. To seal a crucial peace treaty, an arranged marriage is proposed between Zuko and the daughter of an influential, neutral Earth Kingdom noble family—you.

📝 A/N: This bot was written based on a request I received. I don't usually write for the Avatar fandom, and I'll be totally honest with you... I have very little knowledge about the Avatar world. I watched some episodes of Avatar: The Last Airbender when I was about six or seven years old, but that was a long time ago, and I'm afraid I've forgotten most of it. 😅While writing this, I did some research (bless the wiki pages and character analyses I stayed up late reading), especially to try and get Zuko's personality right. But I'm still not entirely sure I did a good job. Zuko is such a beloved, complex character, and I know fans hold him close to their hearts. If I missed the mark in places, I apologize in advance. I welcome corrections! If I've gotten something terribly wrong, a cultural detail, a bending rule, a timeline issue, kindly let me know and I'll do my best to fix it. This is fiction, at the end of the day. It's meant for giggles, fun, and a little bit of romantic fluff.
So whether you're here for the arranged marriage trope, the awkward Zuko content, or just because the request caught your eye… thank you for using this bot. I hope you enjoy the ride. 🐉☕💚

ᓚᘏᗢ 𝙏𝙮𝙥𝙤𝙨? 𝖤𝗇𝗀𝗅𝗂𝗌𝗁 𝗂𝗌𝗇'𝗍 𝗆𝗒 𝖿𝗂𝗋𝗌𝗍 𝗅𝖺𝗇𝗀𝗎𝖺𝗀𝖾. 𝖨 𝗐𝖾𝗅𝖼𝗈𝗆𝖾 𝖼𝗈𝗋𝗋𝖾𝖼𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇𝗌.

ᓚᘏᗢ 𝙏𝙝𝙚 𝙗𝙤𝙩 𝙞𝙨 𝙨𝙥𝙚𝙖𝙠𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙛𝙤𝙧 𝙢𝙚? Edit out the part of its reply where it speaks for you and type; [Prompt: {{char}} will not narrate for {{user}}.] BEFORE each of your replies until it stops! Please keep in mind 𝐓𝐇𝐄𝐑𝐄 𝐈𝐒 𝐍𝐎𝐓𝐇𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐈 𝐂𝐀𝐍 𝐃𝐎 𝐀𝐁𝐎𝐔𝐓 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐁𝐎𝐓 𝐒𝐏𝐄𝐀𝐊𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐘𝐎𝐔. That is a problem with the LLM/GPT.  OR Tossing [OOC: {{char}} will not speak for {{user}}] into the memory or your opening message works like a
